linkType.label: Link type
linkType.helpText: Choose where this slide should link when clicked.

navigationCategory.label: Shared category
navigationCategory.helpText: Optional. When set, every selected Shop page slide opens inside this one category context.
navigationCategory.placeholder: Select one category for all slides...

shopPage.label: Shop page
shopPage.helpText: Optional. Select a Shop page layout for this slide. This avoids creating a separate category per look.

entityLink.label: Category or product detail page
entityLink.helpText: Select an existing storefront category or product detail page URL.

customUrl.label: Custom URL
customUrl.helpText: Enter any internal or external URL for this slide.
